violations.text: Menu is lacking allergen statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by (buckets ). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Wood is used in the construction of (food storage shelves ) in the (front counter ) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (hood vents ) have an accumulation of soil residue and grease buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
3 bay sink observed in poor repair. Observed leakage at plumbing. PIC informed. Systems must be maintain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Handwashing sink in the kitchen is lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
